_comment: Allowlist of gated reusable-release refs (consumed by the release-pin scan).
Each entry is a 40-hex commit SHA of cinatra-ai/.github whose
wall). An extension repo's release.yml MUST pin its
reusable-extension-release.yml@<ref> to a SHA in this list; any other ref is
treated as UNGATED and fails the gate closed.
The wall first appears at 1e4448a (tag v0.1.1). The older 671d3e6f (v0.1.0)
and the pre-tag fea09b38 have NO `environment:` on the release job and are
DELIBERATELY absent here. Publishing a NEW gated reusable-workflow tag =>
verify its release job still carries `environment: release-approval`, then
add its SHA below (and bump the extension repos onto it).
